sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "categories" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "description" TEXT NULL, "icon" TEXT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "parent_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES categories (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "installer_frameworks" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "description" TEXT NULL, "silent_args" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_built_in" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_built_in" IN (0, 1)), "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "installers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "content_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "main_executable" TEXT NOT NULL, "installer_type" TEXT NULL, "silent_args" TEXT NULL, "file_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "total_size_bytes" INTEGER NULL, "file_hash_sha256" TEXT NULL, "original_name" TEXT NULL, "is_verified" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_verified" IN (0, 1)), "last_verified_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "software" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "slug" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "version" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "publisher" TEXT NULL, "category_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES categories (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "installer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES installers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "icon_filename" TEXT NULL, "is_auto_installable" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_auto_installable" IN (0, 1)), "requires_admin" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("requires_admin" IN (0, 1)), "requires_internet" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("requires_internet" IN (0, 1)), "min_os_version" TEXT NULL, "architecture" TEXT NULL, "website_url" TEXT NULL, "license_type" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "installer_framework_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES installer_frameworks (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "extra_silent_args" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "software_dependencies" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "software_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES software (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "dependency_software_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES software (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "is_required" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_required" IN (0, 1)), "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), UNIQUE ("software_id", "dependency_software_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "installation_packs" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "description" TEXT NULL, "icon" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pack_items" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "pack_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES installation_packs (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "software_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES software (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), UNIQUE ("pack_id", "software_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "installation_queue" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "software_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES software (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "installer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES installers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "pack_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES installation_packs (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "progress" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "queue_position" INTEGER NULL, "error_message" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "started_at" INTEGER NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "installation_history" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "software_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES software (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "pack_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES installation_packs (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "software_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "software_version" TEXT NULL, "installer_type" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "error_details" TEXT NULL, "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "completed_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "machine_info" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "settings" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NULL, "value_type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'string', "description" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "logs" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "level" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info', "message" TEXT NOT NULL, "context" TEXT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)));
CREATE INDEX idx_history_comp_st ON installation_history (completed_at, status)
